hotel_name: Khách sạn Hoianese Quiet Old Town (Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel)

reviews.title: Hospitality is the best.
reviews.text: When I mentioned at check-in that I would be participating in a tour that departs before breakfast time, Ms. Spring cheerfully responded that they could accommodate me earlier. The following morning at breakfast, Ms. Kimmi kindly packed up the leftover food for me. Thank you very much for your great service. I was able to enjoy the tour experience.

reviews.title: The budget room needs an improvment
reviews.positives:
- Room is clean and big with a window, seems to be newly designed. Bed is comfortable and new towels were replaced everyday which was nice. The bathroom was comfortable and had hot water for a very long time. 
- Helen and Sunny were very kind and helped us a lot with transport and more. Coffee and tea is available for free.
reviews.negatives:
- Lots of mites everywhere in the room (they don’t sting), worms in the bathroom, also we had a little gecko friend. On our first day we asked the staff to handle the problem but nothing really changed. 
- Room had a weird smell that came from the bathroom.
- Light came through the lobby so the room wasn’t fully dark at night.
- We had a flood in our bathroom because a pipe broke down in the middle of the night. It was inconvenient but a staff came really quick and fixed the pipe.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice and pleasant place.  Well kept and really clean with good welcome snacks.  The staff were really friendly and hospitable including making a point to remember our names.  Bao’s guide around old town was well appreciated.   Will certainly be back when there is a chance

reviews.title: Minor Teething problems easily fixed but staff are fantastic!
reviews.positives:
The staff were 100% the best and most helpful staff I’ve encountered in SE Asia…
Helen,Sunny and Gavy were all super attentive,informative and could not do enough to help..
reviews.negatives: No TV in room and unfortunately it rains 24/7 from October-February which was miserable as we had to spend long periods in our room with no entertainmentI know I should of done due diligence on the weather!

reviews.title: Jjang jjang Hoanis is great!
reviews.text: I visited not long after it was built, and the bedding is clean and the hot water works well. I had a very comfortable stay. The location and price were very good, except for the fact that there was a hotel or house in front, which meant I couldn't open the curtains. I regret only staying for one night.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
I liked the staff who are very friendly, funny, and amazing. 

Emma, Ivy, and Helen were extraordinary and they made our stay a great one.

reviews.title: Genuinely nice place with super helpful staff
reviews.text: The staff here are very nice and always willing to go above and beyond to help you with anything you need. That was really the stand out aspect of this place. The free coffee and drinks were nice too. The room itself was a little small, the location is an bit of a walk from where you probably want to be (but at least it’s quiet and dark at night), and the bathroom shower situation was pretty ridiculous (there’s no way to take a shower without getting water everywhere). But I did appreciate that the staff are super friendly and helpful and do their best to go above and beyond. It took what would’ve been a fine hotel experience and made it great.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good room nice location would stay again

reviews.title: Nice and quiet stay near the Old Town.
reviews.text:
Good value for money boutique hotel, (20 rooms), nicely renovated. 
Good location: not too far from the Old Town and the River (15-30 min walk, depending on your pace).
The neighbourhood is authentic and you can find good places to enjoy the local food specialities.
The staff at the Reception is doing an excellent job to inform you in detail about the many places to visit and can make arrangements for booking cars/vans at reasonable prices.
The room I had was fine with a nice bathtub. The breakfast was good (with VN coffee) and served to the table in a quiet atmosphere (a good change from the crowded buffets of bigger hotels).
I also appreciated the (optional) cultural part including a walking tour and a history talk from a specialist.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff were very friendly and helpful - Kimmi and Spring were very accommodating! Location was great and the complimentary walking tour was much appreciated.
reviews.negatives: The shower set up was slightly difficult to use.

reviews.title: Wonderful experience with 2 nights
reviews.text:
This hotel is located on a quiet street, yet still within a convenient walking distance of about 15 minutes to the main areas- Hoi an night market and ancient town . I had booked two rooms, and we were pleasantly surprised to receive a complimentary upgrade to larger rooms with both street and lake views.
The rooms were clean, modern, and well-maintained. The water pressure in the shower was excellent, and the beds were very comfortable—we had a great night’s sleep.
Our first impression was very positive, thanks to Kimmy, who warmly welcomed us on arrival. The reception team—Spring, Kimmy, Helen, and Emma—were always friendly and greeted us with genuine smiles.
They were approachable and extremely helpful throughout our stay. A special thanks to Spring, who came to the rescue on my first night when I realized we were missing bath towels, and also assisted us in arranging the coconut basket ride.
The breakfast was delicious and has variety of food , though there is no buffet available, but you can ask for second helping
Overall, we had a wonderful experience, and I would definitely choose to stay here again without any hesitation. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Lovely hotel close to the old town
reviews.positives:
Staff was extremely helpful. We tried all their recommendations for food and tailors, all excellent.  
It is super close to the old town. We walked all the time. The breakfast was really good. I would come back. We checked in late, and they left everything ready for us.
reviews.negatives: All good in general. A bit of noise from the ventilation on the 4th floor. It is manageable, but If you're sensitive, bring your earplugs. They offer earplugs too.

reviews.title: Best hotels to stay in Da Nang and Hoi An.
reviews.text: In mid-March, I stayed at the best hotel during my trip to Da Nang and Hoi An. I used three hotels during my trip, including a 5-star hotel, but this hotel was the most comfortable. The hospitality and smiles of the hotel staff were the best, without a doubt. The location is also close to the old town, in a quiet area with stylish cafes, and I highly recommend it. If I get a chance to come back here, I will definitely want to stay again.

reviews.title: Pleasant, clean and charming hotel with the best possible staff.
reviews.positives: The staff is excellent, delightful Gavy and Ivy helped so much and were very kind. Location was definitely quieter away from the nightlife, but construction present all around so some daytime noise at this time. Not a problem for us, it was stopped at dark.
reviews.negatives: The ventilation in the wet room/ bathroom wasn’t adequate and kept things damp and warm. Small issue and air conditioner helped. Seated shower took some getting used to, but is actually clever.

reviews.title: Value for money budget hotel
reviews.text: Hotel is located in a small quiet lane. We were upgraded to a slightly bigger room on the third floor. Only thing lacking in the room is a TV. Although there is no safe in the room, there is a lockable drawer at the desk. No bottled water but filtered water provided.

reviews.title: rough start, but in the end, a very comfortable almost 2 week stay at Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel
reviews.positives:
A lot of things to like about this hotel, with #1 being the staff, especially Ivy, Min, Tin, Helen.  On the first night, i had a hard time because the strong smell of bugspray in the room/on the bed made it really hard for me to breathe.  Without me saying anything the next morning, Ivy went out of her way to do everything she could to make me comfortable.  Really, really proactive on her part.  Min and Helen gave me fantastic local recommendations that really were excellent recommendations that you couldn't google for.  And, Tin, did a great job with new visitor orientation on my first night.

Probably #2  thing i liked was they they upgraded me for free to a really lovely room with a lot of big windows, which really helped with ventilating the room (i was there in january, the temperatures were lovely most of the time, in the 70s, Farenheit).

#3, absolutely fantastic location, just what i was looking for - close enough to talk to old town but far enough outside that i was able to enjoy a lot of local eating places (not touristy ones).  I mean, so, so many great family-owned restaurants and eating places nearby.  All the best ATMs are just around the corner.  Hotel is on small/quiet (relatively speaking street)

#4, the room itself was really nice.
The balcony was really, really nice - It was sheltered from the rain, did not receive direct sunlight (there was plenty of natural light that filled the room when i opened the curtains).  It was a good size balcony, too, *not* so narrow that you could only stand.  It would've been really, really nice if there was a small chair and table on the balcony to enjoy the balcony more.  It was still really lovely, though.

#5 Unlimited, free drinking water, as much as you needed, instead of just the usual 2 bottles only complimentary water per day.  The free and accessible drinking water on each floor was fantastic.

#6 The fridge kept drinks COLD.

#7 Hotel offered reasonable rates for laundry (50k vnd per kg)
reviews.negatives:
1.  Too much strong bugspray smell on my bed, coming from either the mattress or the frame (changing out all sheets and pillows didn't rid of the bugspray smell, so must've been mattress or bedframe).  It gave me headaches and made it hard for me to breathe.  But, the good side is that there were no mosquitoes/only few mosquitoes.
2.  Hand-held shower instead of hands-free shower in the bathroom.  But, the good side is that water pressure was decent and i always had nice *hot* water when i needed it
3.  The sink was weird because the sink spicket had barely any clearance over the sink, so there wasn't enough room for me to put both my hands under the running sink water (i had to cup the water in one hand to pour over the other hand)
4.  hotel charges 3% fee if you pay for the room using credit card, and this either conveyed to me when i booked, or was not conveyed in a way that i was able to easily see this info.  Either way, it came as a surprise to me.  But, the hotel staff were incredibly understanding and gave me an extra couple days to get my debit card working to pull cash from an ATM to pay by VND (the hotel only take VND if you pay by cash, and they do not do any money exchange, like some other Hoi An hotels i have stayed at).  I just had to pay the first few nights, and then i paid the remaining nights after 2 days when i finally got my atm card working
5. no pool, but this is something that was made clear in hotel description, so i was not surprised about it
6.  The room size was smaller than what i'm accustomed to when staying in other (more expensive) hotels in Hoi An; but the room was not so small that i felt cramped.. i think because the space is well utilized
Overall, the pros far outweighed the cons, and i would consider staying at this hotel again if i didn't need a swimming pool and the bugspray use was toned down.

reviews.title: Nice and quiet hotel
reviews.text: Receptionists speak very good English and very helpful.  Room is a tad small.  Clean toilet, bedsheets, pillows and towels.  The breakfast was really good but they should clarify that each client has to get his/her own breakfast.  The first morning, they told me that for 75000vnd I can get a main dish, special local dish, yogurt, drink and free coffee.  I couldn’t finish the meal myself so I shared with my wife.   We were surprised that it was so cheap.  The next day I ordered the same breakfast again, to be told that I cannot share my meal.  That was the oddest thing I’ve ever heard in my life that you cannot so what you want with your food that you pay for.  After some clarification, it turned out that for 75k I can eat as much as I want like I was in a buffet, and only me.  This awkward situation would have been prevented if the right information was conveyed on first morning there.  Other than that little embarrassing event, everything else was perfect.

reviews.title: A very good choice in Hoi An. Highly recommended
reviews.positives: Clean, pleasant, good location and very warm staff

reviews.title: Charming hotel with great location
reviews.text: Very good location near old town. They offer a little pushy various excursions during your check in for a very long time.

reviews.title: One of the stay that we will remember for a long time
reviews.positives: The people, everyone there ia very friendly, humble and helpful. They welcome us with a very warm hospitality
reviews.negatives: A resto area can be improved

reviews.title: Very cute, good location
reviews.text: Very cute room, close enough to the old area to walk but far enough to be quieter which is nice at night. Extremely lovely staff who are very knowledgeable and helpful. Breakfast is delicious. The shower is a bit strange but it had hit water and decent pressure.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I like that they have free walking tour about Hoian’s history.

reviews.title: Perfect location and extremely welcoming staff.
reviews.text:
The hotel is located just outside the old town, which is perfect! A bit of peace and quiet is really nice.
All the staff are very welcoming and helpful. Thank you again, Helen, for your kindness and assistance. We highly recommend it!

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.positives:
The team, Helen, Min and Judy went above and beyond to ensure a smooth check in process. Also, they took the time to share places and things to do during my time here and also ensured I had an early check. I also forgot something at the hotel and there was no hesitation in assisting me retrieve my item. Thank you again for your kind, friendly and helpful support. I was upgraded and the room was clean. I didn't get the rest that was needed. 
I do appreciate the team though.

reviews.title: Good cleanliness, great value for money
reviews.text: Clean rooms and surroundings. Quality of bedding is beyond expectations considering the price point. Service was great with notable mention of Gavy and Tin. Facilities basic but as expected considering the area and size of built-up.

reviews.title: Very nice !
reviews.positives: Everything. Mostly employees. Free coffee did not hurt!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I’ve stayed here several times and everytime I come here they still maintain to their room qualities and the service. The room is clean, well decorated, and the staff Min and Helen are super friendly welcome me and assist me, even I sometimes have a late check in over 21.00 pm.. will like to stay again at this hotel for next time.. please keep it up for the room and services

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I loved how friendly the staff are. The room itself is also really spacious and comfortable. The AC worked really well. They also offer Vietnamese coffee on site through the day which was really nice.
reviews.negatives: I didn't like how low the ceiling is over the bathtub. Breakfast options could also expand a bit.

reviews.title: Paying it forward - unsolicited review
reviews.text:
I’m writing this review to pay it forward—like the helpful reviews that guided me here.

The staff—Gavy, Spring, Ivy, Helen, and Emma—are the true heart of this place. Young and sincere, they speak English beautifully and respond instantly on WhatsApp. They treated me like a dear friend.

A highlight: Helen surprised me with a birthday cake and celebrated with me. When I’d just met Ivy after the history session, she rearranged her plans and rode me to Danang on her scooter to help with an urgent errand.

I’d recognized these staff names from reviews before arriving—that’s why travelers rave about them. Genuine care at an unbeatable price.

I will definitely choose this hotel again. Highly recommended! Already planning my next visit for September and next year.

(Just a small note, there is no pool, you can head to the beach for a swim as alternative).

reviews.title: Very nice place in hoi an
reviews.positives: Very nice rooms and very very nice staff, helped us with everything. They has shampoo shower gel and conditioner at the bathroom and free water.
reviews.negatives: When we moved to the second floor there was a bit of noise from the lobby. And there was also no window outside.

reviews.title: Experience
reviews.text: We stayed 2 nights on early Jan. Min who gave all the details about Hoi An on our arrival. She always greeted with a smile and I appreciate her initiative to have conversation with kindness. As it was our first time in Hoi An she helped us with the recommendation, she made a lot easy for us to know about the place and culture. We realised it was the best experience we had in Vietnam. The location of Hotel was perfect not too far from the central location and not too crowded. It was peaceful. Would definitely choose to stay again if we go to Hoi An.

reviews.title: A wonderful place to stay. The best value you can find :)
reviews.positives: Clean, comfortable, professional service. Feels like home. I had an issue at night and needed support -> The night service responded promptly and took instant action :)

reviews.title: Great hotel but rooms are noisy
reviews.text:
Great location, clean rooms and super friendly staff.  

If you want a quiet room you shouldn’t go there. I stayed on the first floor and you could hear every word of the reception and breakfast. You hear the talks of the other rooms, even someone is taking a shower

reviews.title: Excellent service and nice hotel
reviews.positives: The staff was amazing. When I checked in they only had a room on the lower level by the door. I expressed I didn’t feel comfortable and the next day they upgraded my room with a balcony. They were so sweet and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The tours are a bit pricey

reviews.title: Fantastic Stay with Exceptional Service!
reviews.text:
My recent stay at Hoianese Old Town was truly fantastic! This hotel offers great value for money with its incredibly clean and well-maintained rooms. 
What truly set this hotel apart, however, was the outstanding staff. Every single person I encountered was attentive and genuinely cared for guests. A special shout-out goes to Halen at the front desk, who was an absolute star! Halen went above and beyond, providing invaluable recommendations for tours and incredibly useful local information. It was such a relief to find that all the staff spoke excellent English, making communication effortless and enjoyable.
I highly recommend Hoianese Old Town for anyone looking for a comfortable stay with top-notch service. I'll definitely be back!

reviews.title: Lovely hotel, amazing staff!
reviews.positives: Had a lovely stay here. The staff - Spring, Kimmi, Helen and Emma are an absolute delight - super helpful and can’t do enough for you. The hotel itself was well kept, quiet, and located a short walk from the old town.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Julie was the nicest and kindest, and helped us with everything we asked for.

reviews.title: Fantastic! Would definitely come again. The staff really made this place shine. So positive, friendly and helpful!
reviews.positives: Fantastic property - very cute, comfortable and close to the action in Hoi An.
reviews.negatives: Shower in the bathroom was a bit awkward, but I think that’s because it is a Heritage property with usual spacing in the rooms.

reviews.title: New and so close to the old town but also nice and quiet
reviews.text:
We really enjoyed our stay here, The staff are super friendly and very efficient. The room was nice and a good Bathroom, Although I don’t enjoy showers over baths and this was a corner bath with a handheld shower. 

The breakfast was good and there was lots of it. The only thing missing was a swimming pool and it would’ve been perfect! 

We really enjoyed walking into the old town which was pretty hectic and crazy so it was nice to come back to the calm of this hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
What a wonderful experience at this hotel. The rooms are great, clean, and spacious and the location is perfect as it’s a 7 min walk to the old town and quiet, but the true highlight is the staff here. Helen, Spring, Emma and Kimmi were so friendly and helpful during my stay. Helen spent almost 30 minutes with me going over a map of Hoi An and sharing recommendations and tips. Every time I entered and exited the hotel, the ladies were always there to enthusiastically greet me and send me off, remembering my name and what I scheduled for that day. 

The tours through them were also amazing and I loved my tour guide Cindy, who guided me on both the cycling tour and walking tour. 

Thank you ladies for making this a wonderful experience. I’ll always remember your waves and smiles  ☺️

reviews.title: Wonderful two nights stay in Hoi An
reviews.text: Out of the three hotels we booked during our Vietnam trip, this was hands-down our favorite! The staff—especially Spring, Kimmi, Helen, and the rest of the team—went above and beyond to make us feel at home. It was incredible how they remembered every guest’s name and greeted us warmly every time we walked by. We were even treated to a room upgrade, which was spacious, spotless, and incredibly comfortable. Combined with the fantastic location, our stay here was an absolute delight. We will absolutely be returning on our next trip!

reviews.title: Best staff we’ve experienced across Southeast Asia. Very clean, great location.
reviews.positives: Absolute best hospitality I’ve received at a hotel, and I travel for work. Also very clean and great location.

reviews.title: If you are planning a trip to Hoi An,
reviews.text: This place will be a good choice. I was curious because of the high rating, and upon arrival, I understood why. The friendly staff, including Helen, Kimmy, Spring, and Emma, always greeted us with bright smiles, and the breakfast was excellent every day. The bedding was comfortable and clean, making my stay enjoyable. It was also not far from the Old Town, allowing me to enjoy it while staying quietly.

reviews.title: Quaint, quiet & managed efficiently by a team of very hospitable people!
reviews.positives: Quaint & quiet & perfectly managed by a delightfully friendly team!

reviews.title: Hoi An
reviews.text: Very nice stay just for 1 night. We liked the location because the area was quiet at night but short walk from the old town. All the staff were very helpful and friendly. Spring walked us through checkin and recommended many different activities for us to do while in Hoi An. Overall a great stay and good value for money

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hotel was quiet but in a good location close to the old town. The room was very comfortable and not caramped. Breakfast was excellent and the staff outstanding at taking care of the customers. I worked mostly with Spring who contacted me a couple of days before my booking, but all the staff were most gracious.

reviews.title: Service, decoration and breakfast.
reviews.text:
The boutique hotel have a very nice  decoration and the bed is huge:
The staff is amazing; mainly a lady called Spring.
They make the breakfast to order, there is not so much variety but what they are doing is fresh and delicious.
I would come back.

reviews.title: Great Place - Amazing staff
reviews.positives:
Hotel was very charming, clean, and overall pleasant. Staff made the stay even more enjoyable, they were so friendly. Especially Helen, Spring, Gavy & Kimmi. 

The pillows in the room were some of the best I've had on the trip, so comfortable, easy to fall asleep.
reviews.negatives: Not much I didn't like, only thing that I didn't really enjoy was the step into the big bathtub to shower.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: It has 5 stars on Google review! Happy with the service from Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel. Walking distance to eateries and about 10-12 minutes to the Ancient Town (leisurely walk). Must give thumbs up to the staff, from those I have not met (Helen, who kept in touch via messages) to Ivy, Emma and 1 more girl (I forgot her name) who were enthusiastic in attending to us.  Comfy bed, hearty breakfast, didnt regret our choice at all.

reviews.title: Cultural experience
reviews.positives: Very central and close to the market, bicycle tour, and the hoi an lanterns

reviews.title: Nice hotel and nice day in Hoi An
reviews.text: We had a pleasant stay at this hotel in Hoi An. The room service was good, and the staff were all very kind and helpful. Special thanks to Uyên, Tuyền, and Trinh for their warm hospitality. We had a great night here and would happily recommend this place to others.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel in the center of Hoian
reviews.positives: Very nice set up and facilities. Beautiful décoration and furniture. The ladies at the reception (Emma, Kimmi, Helen, and others) were very helpful and take 20mn when you arrive to orient you in the city.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately my room on the third floor had a window on the internal stairs, the upside was that it was very quiet but not much of view

reviews.title: Cute and sweet place
reviews.text: Staffs are very nice, the hotel is very focusing on heritage education of Hoi An. If you are looking for something more in depth is a good place. They have a variety of activities and workshops linked up too.  It’s very convenient to join the local workshops, instead of looking for them on your own. The location is not bad, since it’s in a quieter location, need to walk a bit to the old town city.  But it’s more peaceful. Breakfast is good too, providing a variety of local food

reviews.title: We would definitely recommend this hotel in Hoi An to anyone looking for a great location, nice room and wonderful staff
reviews.positives: Great location, very nice room and great staff.  Helen was particularly helpful as we were preparing for our trip.

reviews.title: the great reviews are real
reviews.text: A great hotel. Clean. Comfortable. Charming.

reviews.title: The location was terrific and the staff, Kimmi, Tin, Emman and Spring were wonderful
reviews.positives: Great location and very nice rooms

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: The room was beautiful and charming, the bed and pillows were very comfortable, and the staff were  incredibly friendly. Minh is super sweet and made the experience even better.

reviews.title: It’s amazing
reviews.positives: Authenticity

reviews.title: Ideal for a stay near most places of interest
reviews.text: The facilities, location and the attention from the staff were outstanding. They also offer a few tours that are worth considering. It's close to most amenities but yet secluded enough that it feels quite peaceful. Very clean, spacious and comfortable. 100% recommended.

reviews.title: Beautiful and peaceful
reviews.positives: Best place is stayed at. Kind staff and clean facility. Exactly as described

reviews.title: Fantastic Stay at Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel
reviews.text: I had an absolutely wonderful stay at Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel! From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make my stay comfortable and memorable. A special shoutout to Ivy and Min, who truly embody excellent customer service. They are incredibly accommodating, always ready to help, and willing to go above and beyond with anything I needed. Min and Ivy deserve a raise! LOL I also really enjoyed the breakfast. It was delicious and a perfect start to the day. Overall, a fantastic experience and I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hoi An. Thanks again Min and Ivy! You both rock!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wonderful staff! Thanks to Helen, Spring, Kimmi, Emma, and Gavy. I highly recommend the walking food tour, Old Town tour, and History lecture.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This hotel is excellent value for money. The room was surprisingly big and very clean. It's in a nice location, only a short walk from the old town. I had a room with a breakfast. The breakfast was very good too. The 2 staff who I mostly encountered were Sunny and Julie. Both were very nice and super helpful. The hotel also offers bicycle & motorcycle hire at very reasonable rates and they help book excursions too. I highly recommend this hotel and would definitely stay there again.

reviews.title: Clean and affordable hotel, great location
reviews.positives: It was very clean and conveniently located

reviews.title: Exceptional hotel
reviews.text: This hotel is amazing! From warm welcome by very friendly and kind receptionists sharing knowledge about Hoi An, hospitality, attention to detail and to guests,  and staff being proactive in making our stay exceptional. Location is brilliant - close walkable to old town but also quiet at night. Room has everything that is needed, and free complimentary water and welcome/goodbye small gifts were very thoughtful. I would definately stay here again.

reviews.title: Excellent stay and I am coming back there - next time longer
reviews.positives: The rooms were beautiful and have almost a Feng Shui feeling to them - everything is perfectly placed. I had a great night and wonderful stay. If you are there make definitely the town tour which starts at around 9:00 nearby. This tour was the best way to find out about the culture and history of the town and shows you also great food places. Its done by a woman who grew up there. Everybody was helpful and very service oriented - Helen helped me a lot there when arriving.
reviews.negatives: The only thing was that sometimes when you were served at the reception and some other guest came and needed something they were not queued but instead I had to wait - specifically in the morning when checking out this was stressful because I had some time pressure.

reviews.title: Cozy hotel with very welcoming staff
reviews.text:
The hotel is located just far enough from the hustle and bustle of Hoi An Old Town, but close enough to easily walk there. Our hotel room was quite cozy, with traditional decorations and furniture.

When we arrived, Ms Xuân (Spring) gave us a warm welcome and gave us extensive information on what there’s to do in Hoi An, greatly helping us plan our short stay in the area. She also recommended us an Ao Dai (traditional dress) rental and massage places, both at which we had great experiences. Other staff have also been very warm to us whenever we walked through the lobby.

Besides these experiences, they also offer laundry services at an affordable price and have free flow drip coffee at the lobby!

We highly recommend the hotel and would definitely stay here again on a repeat visit.

reviews.title: Excellent and very warm, helpful staff.
reviews.positives:
We had an excellent stay at this hotel! The service was outstanding from the moment we arrived until check-out. The staff were very welcoming, attentive, and always ready to help with anything we needed. They even have hotel transfort with good rates! And even recommends places to see and dine.
Our room was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, which made our stay very relaxing. The surrounding area is quiet. The bathroom was super nice with a cute bathtub.
The overall atmosphere of the hotel was warm and inviting, and everything was well organized.
What truly stood out was the level of hospitality. The team went above and beyond to make sure guests felt comfortable and well taken care of. Shout out to Ms. Emma, Ms Spring and Mr. Tin! Thank you also for the cute gifts!
I highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for superb service and a pleasant stay. I would definitely come back again!

reviews.title: Good Location, friendly staff
reviews.text: Location of hotel is good. Staff is friendly and helpful

reviews.title: A superb, meticulously run property that provides outstanding value for money.
reviews.positives: Clean; modern; comfortable (sensational bed); a wonderful soaking tub; welcoming, attentive staff; great tips about what to see and do while in Hoi An; outstanding location.

reviews.title: The staff are the real highlight
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful and the location walking to each place is not bad. I recommend you get the room with bathtub as nice cool water is perfect to relax in after the heat. The staff were the best as I enjoyed conversation with all of them, the information provided is also very useful and I recommend listening to everythint. 5 stars ⭐

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very helpful staff HELEN SPRING KIMMI EMMA GAVY

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It is a boutique hotel that recently opened, with a retro style that is very stylish. The rooms are comfortable and have great views. Guests are welcomed with free mung bean cookies and unlimited drinking water. I would also like to especially praise a few front desk ladies: ***, ***, *** and ***, who greet us warmly every time we enter and exit the hotel. They also introduced us to great places to eat and have fun locally, which is really nice. The hotel is very clean and comfortable.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We stayed here for three nights on our honeymoon and can’t say enough amazing things about it!! The staff, especially wonderful Helen, Ivy, and Min, were so so helpful, kind, attentive, and caring and made it feel like home!!! They went above and beyond. They helped us arrange tours, gave us amazing information and the hotel was cozy and beautiful! 🥰

reviews.title: Best Hospitality Experience We’ve Ever Had in Vietnam
reviews.text:
My wife and I have traveled all over Vietnam, staying in both 3-star hotels and luxury resorts, but we have never experienced service as exceptional as this.

The hotel was clean, comfortable, and perfectly located near all the popular spots in Hoi An. What truly made our stay unforgettable was the staff everyone was incredibly kind, helpful, and made us feel right at home.

A huge thank you to Helen, Spring, Kimmi, Emma, Gavy, and Tin for their outstanding hospitality and care throughout our stay. This has honestly been one of the best hotel experiences of our lives.

reviews.title: Great hotel with friendly staff and delicious breakfast
reviews.positives: Min was a great host. Breakfast was delicious and filling. Location was convenient to the ancient city. Really enjoyed the free walking tour.
reviews.negatives: We were not a fan of the shower.

reviews.title: The Hotel experience is charming, cultural,  with something special gained by guests fortunate enough to experience.
reviews.text: My 2nd stay in a week down from Danang as the initial time spent was so uniquely charming friendly like a family. Most unique and delightful feeling.  I cannot recommend the incredible staff whom work so proudly in their home town and share the wonder of this magnificent area..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
This was one of the best stays I have ever had while traveling. The staff truly set this hotel apart from any other I have been to- Ivy, Min, and Helen were beyond incredible, they were personable and genuinely cared about me as a guest. I have never experienced such great service, they went above and beyond for me from the second I walked into the hotel until I left.

I booked my room at 09:00 after a terrible night in another local hotel. I was unfortunately not able to sleep and asked Hoianese if it would be possible for me to check in early so I could get some sleep. When I arrived at 10:00, they already had my room ready for me and were genuinely concerned that I get some rest. They were so sweet and checked on me later that day to make sure I was feeling better, they remembered my name the entire time I was on the property, and were always more than eager to help with anything I needed. 

The property was also wonderful. The hotel was a short walk to Old Town- a great location away from all the noise and chaos of the main streets. The room was bright, clean and spacious, and the bed was incredibly comfortable. The area and hotel felt very safe- even walking at night as a solo female traveler. A true sanctuary, I could not recommend Hoianese more and am very grateful to have found it.

reviews.title: Great time!
reviews.text: We had an amazing time here. The hotel was nice, the staff was amazing. They cared and it showed. Kimmi and Spring were so helpful! Their recommendations were spot on, their attitude was perfect. I can not praise them enough!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff was outstanding.

reviews.title: Kindest staff ever
reviews.text: Had a warm welcoming stay at Hoianese Hotel. Thank you to Helen, Emma, Kimmi & Spring for making this a pleasant stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: They are very friendly at the hotel, especially Helen and Covy, a nice hotel and a very good breakfast.

reviews.title: Staffs are SUPER
reviews.text: I stayed for a few nights and staffs are SUPER NICE !!!! Kimmi, Spring, Emma every one were GREAT!!!!!! I prefer to use less plastic bottle for water and the hotel provided water in glass bottle every day. There is also a cafe/dining area if you want to make yourself a Vietnamese Coffee, or Ginger Tea, or just to dine with a table. Everytime I am at the reception the staffs said hi and chat a bit, giving me a vibe at the hostel in terms of great hospitality -- it made me feel like HOME! The staff is super helpful in terms of providing information for tourists activities and dinning places. I registered a history talk at other Hoianese hotel, which is only about 10 -15 mins walking distance, which I appreciate a hotel to host such activities. The recommended dinning places for Banh Mi, Chicken rice etc... are mainly not with AC but they are cheap and good! Even if you do not have a plan what to do in Hoi An, the hotel and the staffs can definitely give you some insights! The hotel locates at around 15 mins walking distance to the old town. It may be some distance in the afternoon but it also provides you with some quiet neighborhood. When I checked-out they also gave me a small gift! The hotel is also walking distance (5 mins) from a 24/7 self-laundry site. The hotel also provides laundry services. I would definitely come back if I visit Hoi An again!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The property was very clean and the staff were amazing! Gavy explained all there was to see in Hoi An and suggested some shows/places that we went and loved! Ivy was also very friendly and sweet. We loved it here and will be booking another night before we leave.

reviews.title: Value-for-money stay with amazing service
reviews.text:
Although I only stayed for one night, I had a great experience. The staff (Helen, Spring, Kimmi, Emma) were all so welcoming and lovely. They gave me a rundown of all the spots to hit and their recommendations. 

Traditional snacks were also offered at the start of my stay and there was even a small souvenir before I left. Room was clean, although walls were a little thin. It's about a 5-10 minute walk from the old town. Will definitely revisit when I'm back!

reviews.title: Lim and ivy were great!!!
reviews.positives: The staff, location, absolutely convenient and also very professional attitude towards the guests. Thank you all from the bottom of my of my heart.

reviews.title: Perfect location and clean accommodation.
reviews.text: The accessibility on foot was excellent, and the amenities in the room and the bathroom condition were very satisfying. Thanks to the friendly attitudes of the staff (Spring, Kimmi) and the clean hygiene conditions, I was able to have a pleasant time. The Wi-Fi was also reliably connected and convenient. There was a scooter rental system available in the hotel, and the breakfast was excellent and very quiet. Overall, the satisfaction relative to the price is very high, making it a place I would recommend to anyone!

reviews.title: A nice surprise
reviews.positives: The staff welcomed us in a really nice way and helped us to organize our activities. They were also on call 24h in case of need. Our room was pleasant, clean, with all the facilities we needed. Breakfast was super good. We also did a very nice walking tour organized by the hotel chain. I highly recommend this place

reviews.title: Having a wonderful time!
reviews.text: We had a great time here. The staff were incredibly kind (especially thanks to Kimmy) and provided us with very helpful information about Hoi An. It truly felt like visiting a friend’s home. Regarding the room, we chose a very basic option, so there was no view or special advantage, but it was simple and clean. If I have the chance to visit Hoi An again, I would definitely stay here.

reviews.title: Wonderful hotel that helps with everything! Amazing breakfast.  Be sure to take the bike tour to Cam Kin with Bao - one
reviews.positives: Wonderful hotel that helps with everything! Amazing breakfast.  Be sure to take the bike tour to Cam Kin with Bao - one of our most memorable experiences.

reviews.title: Outstanding Staff, Unforgettable Stay
reviews.text:
Very happy overall with my stay. The hotel is well-kept, comfortable, and in a great location. But what really sets it apart is the staff.
Kimmi, Helen, and Emma were all friendly and attentive throughout.

Special shoutout to Spring, who went above and beyond when I first arrived — she took the time to orient me to the area, gave me food and activity recommendations, and helped me figure out logistics for tours and transport. That kind of personal attention made a real difference, especially as a solo traveler.

Every aspect of the stay was handled well. Top-notch service across the board. Honestly one of the highlights of my entire Vietnam trip!

Highly recommended. Will absolutely be staying here again next time I'm in Hội An!

reviews.title: Super friendly, beautiful, clean hotel next to the heart of Hoi an
reviews.positives: The hotel staff was amazing. They were so helpful and friendly and the free tours were amazing as well. The breakfast was also huge and so great. I would definitely come back to stay here.

reviews.title: exceptional staff
reviews.text: It was the wonderful and attentive staff that made this accommodation so special. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: I would recommend anyone to stay here
reviews.positives: This was really the perfect stay in Hoi An - I couldnt have asked for better. From the moment you check-in you are greeted with the kindness and care from Sunny and Julie - Sunny gave me great information about Hoi An and helped me schedule some tours to make the most of my stay in Hoi An. The room was perfect - so clean and the bath/shower was so nice - the design overall was top notch.

reviews.title: Beautiful place
reviews.text: I loved everything about this place the location the staff the rooms everything! :)

reviews.title: Amazing stay for local culture and experience!
reviews.positives: We absolutely loved this hotel, it’s in a really decent location just a short walk - 5 mins from the river! The room was clean and the bed really comfy. The real stand out for us was the staff! Ivy & Helen were absolutely amazing, they gave us all the local spots to go to, booked us a private coconut boat with a local company which was much cheaper than some of the tourist traps. They booked us the best table at Morning Glory restaurant (must visit, food is 10/10!). We also did a free walking tour which was run by the hotel and we loved it! We can’t thank them enough for looking after us and being on WhatsApp for throughout the day for whatever we needed. We would definitely go back!
reviews.negatives: The shower is in the bath, so if you’re tall (over 6ft) you might struggle, and the bath is small. This could be unique to our room though!

reviews.title: Perfect stay
reviews.text: This this place is definitely a 10 out of 10 THE best place I stayed in Hoi An visiting 4 times. Absolutely no complaints the staff was amazing and the place is beautiful clean and in the perfect location. This will now be my home away from home when I visit again.

reviews.title: The staff went all out and did an amazing job!
reviews.positives: Lovely

reviews.title: Long lasting memories
reviews.text:
My friend and I stayed 5 nights at this place.  We were amazed immediately on our first day.  There were 4 service members named Helen, Kimmi, Emma, and Spring who have created a memory of, not just the hotel, Hoi An that will stay with us forever.  As soon as we checked in, they remembered our names and have greeted us by our names thereafter.  Helen planned out every day activities for us.  The 4 of these ladies in turn take time to book shows/tours for us (per our requests).      When time for breakfast, these ladies would bring breakfast, whatever we ordered, to us.  As many times as we need.  On the mornings that we got picked up early for tours, they would packed breakfast in brown bags for us to bring along.  I remember telling my friend…they remind me of my wife who would pack lunch for me when I had to leave for the whole day.  Bao is a great tour guide.  From Bao, I learned a great deal of Hoi An history and VietNam as a whole.
In the end, it’s not about a grand, glittering, fancy and pretentious hotel.  It’s all about the kindness, the smiles and the “hello” I received every time I left and when I returned that make this place memorable.  To me, it’s not a hotel .  To me, it’s my private vacation home.  The staff at this place have given me a wonderful experience and a long lasting memory.  Every time I speak of Hoi An, I will think of the staff at Hoianese Old Town Hotel.   They will always have a special place in my heart.

reviews.title: Best Experience in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Couldn’t be better. Excellent little hotel group focused on showcasing Hoi An’s culture and history. Service was beyond exceptional - Min, Ivy, and Helen especially were so helpful. We enjoyed visiting Hoi An and signed up for the Memories show, the coffee course, and the cooking course all through the hotel, which had clearly vetted the many options throughout the city and found the best quality ones. We also loved the history tour organized by the hotel and run by Bao, who is so passionate and friendly.  We extended our three day stay to four days because there was so much to do and we felt so comfortable. We only wish we had longer still!

reviews.title: Best hotel ever
reviews.text:
They are best in hospitality.
Kimmi, emma, spring, helen we are grateful to you all for the exceptional hospitality. 

Also we forgot our bag when we checked out for the airport, they were kind enough to help us out by sending a driver quickly with the bag and saving our trip. 

They go over and beyond to help out the ones staying at the hotel. And even suggest places and free tours to boost your stay

reviews.title: Exceptional

The hotel located in quiet street, just ten minutes from the old town. I highly recommend to stay here if you intend to visit in Hoi An. And they surprised us on my wife's birthday day, they decorated our room and even brought us a cake!!

reviews.title: Hospitality at its best.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel in quiet location

reviews.title: Perfect stay in Hoi An!
reviews.positives: This was our favourite stay in all of Vietnam! Ivy, Min, and Helen are the friendliest and most helpful staff we’ve encountered. They helped us with advice on what to do, tours, and helped us with transportation. We loved chatting with them every time we entered or exited. The hotel was super clean, well designed, and located in a very convenient location close to Old Town. The rooms were spacious, the bed was soooo comfyyyy, and we appreciated the storage and big bathrooms. We liked that the hotel was designed with Asian elements to give it a sense of culture and history. The breakfasts were soo good, tons of food with juice and fruits, and interesting Hoi An and western options. I would 100% stay here again and recommend this to anyone else looking for a place in Hoi An.

reviews.title: A very good stay
reviews.text: Staff was very friendly and helpful, especially Helen and Kimmy ! The breakfasts were great, the free walking tour they suggested was very insightful and interesting and the room was well cleaned! We totally recommend this hotel

Special thanks to the lovely staff: Min and Helen, who made our stay extra warm and inviting.

reviews.title: A terrific boutique hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is less than 10 minutes walk to old town and the main sites so well situated. Room was quiet and well appointed.   Had many options for breakfast and portions were large and food was excellent.  Really good.  They also offered a number of tours and helped me arrange a private tour by motorcycle to Hue. over the Hai Van Pass. The service was just great and the staff- Helen. Ivy and Min (hopefully got names right) couldn’t have been more helpful. Room was spotless.  Would highly recommend if staying in Hou An.    Great value too.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Another great stay at Hoianese! I have traveled around southeast Asia for 8 months now and Hoianese Old Town Boutique Hotel has been the best place I’ve stayed- so great that I came back a second time! They treat all their guests like family and give great recommendations for activities, tailors, or local restaurants around Hoi An while also teaching you to make local Vietnamese coffee in the lobby.

The rooms here are also in great condition- you are greeted with cold bottles of water, a very comfy bed, and clean towels each morning, making for a great place to unwind after a long day exploring the town.

A special thanks to Tien, Min, and Helen who made my 2nd stay in Hoi An so unforgettable- I hope to make another trip back to see them again soon!

reviews.title: One of the best Hotels

reviews.title: Amazing stay
reviews.text: The hotel had one of the best service staff that I have ever experienced. I was planning a marriage proposal this trip and the team helped out tremendously, going above and beyond to assist me, including getting a rose bouquet, setting up the whole room with props and also helping us with recording the special live moment. HUGE shout-out to Helen, Hannah, Min, Emma and Ivy for making our stay in Hoi An truly amazing and truly Hoianese. Helen in particular helped a lot in terms of the overall coordination, and we are grateful for that. Hannah and Nina (or Lina?) and another staff that helped us capture the lovely moments on camera, and even the housekeeping lady that helped with the decoration. Super happy with our stay and we really hope to be back again soon!

reviews.title: Incomparable

reviews.title: Delightful Experience At Quaint Hoianese
reviews.text:
Welcomed by the friendly and helpful staff at Hoianese, we enjoyed our stay at this little gem of a hotel in Hoi An. Kudos to Emma, Helen, Ivy and Min. 
The room was well-appointed, the all-day coffee and tea bar was refreshing, and the breakfast on order was more than generous.  
Thank you for the transport arrangements. The gift upon checkout is well-appreciated.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: By far the nicest staff I have ever met.

reviews.title: I want to praise myself for being able to find a hotel like this.
reviews.text:
During my third trip to Vietnam, I visited Hoi An for the first time. The Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel is located slightly outside the main tourist area of the old town, on a quiet street away from the hustle and bustle. (It's just right for strolling through the streets on foot.)

Upon check-in, staff member Helen kindly explained about Hoi An while brewing Vietnamese coffee for me. Although my English was limited, she patiently assisted me.

They provide a wealth of information and tours very thoroughly. I believe their hospitality reflects a desire for visitors to fully enjoy Hoi An, rather than just attempting to sell tours.

During Helen's guidance, there was a coffee workshop where we experienced making iconic Vietnamese coffees such as egg coffee, salt coffee, and coconut coffee ourselves. For more details, you can visit Tropical Cafe & Bistro.

I cycled to this cafe using the rental bicycles from the hotel, which was also very affordable at 50,000 VND for a day.

Now, back to the hotel; the room was cute, clean, and the king-sized bed allowed for a comfortable stay. If I had to point out something, it would be that the bathroom light and fan share the same switch, which means you can’t run the fan without turning off the light. That's about the only issue in what is otherwise an excellent hotel.

I would like to compliment myself on finding such a hotel. Thank you to Helen and all the staff!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Xin and Gavi were really nice and warm to me, they were kind and helpful in my experience. Thanks for everything ♥️

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Hoianese hotel was the highlight of my trip to Hoi An. The team (Ivy, Min, Helen, and Emma) was so helpful, friendly, the best team you can imagine. 

The hotel is arranging history talk and walking tour (Free!). It is the best way to learn about Hoi An and Vietnam. I think without these activities, I wouldn’t understand and enjoy much in Hoi An. Also, they are giving excellent recommendations for food and tailoring so you won’t get scammed. 

The room was spacious, very clean, have all amenities needed even umbrella. 

Breakfast service was excellent. There are local and western food and you can choose more than one item. 

Location was superb. Just 5 mins walk to old town. 

They even prepped farewell gift for me🥹 Everything was just excellent!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: From Check-in until Check-Out a superb experience. Charming, clean Rooms, Amazing Staff, especially Min and Helen made my stay not only a memorable one, both shared their knowledge of this magical place due to the rich history of Vietnam and Hoi An itself. Cám Ơn

All the ladies at the house keeping is always smile and work hard. I want them to work for me haha! Don't search for any other hotel, book this one trust me and thank me later!

Sangat rekomended utk yang mau stay di Hoi An karena hotel staff reception nya (Ming) sangat friendly dan informatif menjelaskan serta memberikan hospitality terbaik, termasuk menjelaskan beberapa objek wisata di Hoi An dan rekomendasinya. reviews.title: I will be back here every time I visit Hoi An!
reviews.positives: Most of all: the staff. The young girls, Helen, Min, and Judy were all sweet, courteous, helpful, and professional. No complaints about the facility either. Clean, beautiful, spacious room. Walking distance to old town, neighboring main streets and shops (there’s a Highland coffee shop right at the corner where you can chill and shield yourself from the burning sun). This hotel chain doesn’t just provide tourists with a place to stay; they want to provide you a cultural experience. Make sure you look at their brochure, filled with recommendations for activities and good places to eat.  Very good value for what i paid!!!

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
From the moment we walked in we enjoyed staying in the Town Hotel. 
Min, Ivy and Helen have been super helpful and professional, we got a free upgrade and the free walking tour was really great! 
Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
I felt right at home the moment I arrived—everyone at check-in welcomed me like family, which inspired me to extend my stay to nearly two weeks! The rooms are comfortable, well-equipped, close to the old town, and perfect for anyone visiting Hoi An.
The staff truly made my stay exceptional. Tata, Emma, Helen, and Min always greeted me with smiles and daily activity suggestions, while Bao and Cindy were fantastic local guides. Tien even took me to a local fish market to see fishermen bringing in their fresh catch—an unforgettable experience.
Thanks to the amazing team, my time at Hoianese was incredibly special. I hope to return soon and highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Hoi An!

reviews.title: Highly recommend for travelers
reviews.text: Khách sạn gần phố cổ, vị trí thuận tiện. Các bạn nhân viên rất hiếu khách và dễ thương. Quầy cafe vietnam ở lobby pha cho khách rất ngon. Ngày đầu tiên tới Hội An đã được bạn Ivy giới thiệu các địa điểm thú vị và đc book vé show Hoian memories với giá tốt, show Terdah xuất sắc. Phòng sạch sẽ, rộng rãi, bồn tắm thoải mái, wifi mạnh, giá phòng hợp lý, các bạn Uyên, Tuyền, Trinh service tốt. Cuối ngày checkout đc tặng souvenir làng gốm rất đáng yêu. Chắc chắn sẽ quay lại nếu có dịp và highly recommend cho khách du lịch vì ở đây có free city walking tour và history talk bao gồm trong service 🙌🏼

reviews.title: I would certainly return to stay at this hotel again as it was a great location, exceptional staff, and a lovely hotel o
reviews.positives: The receptionists were ALL amazing. Especially Helen and Min. The breakfasts were great. Help with knowing what to do and where to go was excellent as were the discounts for different tours. The room was just LOVELY as was the view. I enjoyed being in a quiet space but 5-7 min walk away from Old Town. Which is a relief to not be in the middle of such chaos. There are great cafes and restaurants and spas right nearby. They offer efficient laundry services and help with shipping services (if you buy too much in Hoi An to fit in your luggage). There is ample toilet paper!! Overall a really lovely experience.
reviews.negatives: It would be great to have a little swimming pool to cool off in during the HOT days and a few more tables indoors for breakfast time as it gets crowded.

reviews.title: Amazing Hoi An Trip
reviews.text: I had a fun and wonderful trip at Hoi An. Thanks to Hoianese  Quiet Old Town staffs, Min, Ivy and Helen for their hospitality and informative service to ease my trip planning.  Special mentioning to Min,  whom provided excellent service,, friendly,  candid and  gave me useful tips to explore Hoi An  and interesting places of attraction with guided tour option. Fabulous trip indeed!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Thanks to the administration for the perfect service and quality of every little thing in this amazing hotel! Additionally, there is lots of respect to these extremely friendly reception ladies: Helen, Min, and Judy. There's everyone  is doing a great job!
Best wishes 🧡

reviews.title: Exceptional Stay – Highly Recommended!
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful stay at Hoianese Quiet Old Town Hotel, and the experience exceeded my expectations in every way. Right from the beginning, I was pleasantly surprised with a complimentary deluxe room upgrade, which set the tone for a fantastic stay.


A special thanks to Min, who provided incredibly detailed and helpful information about activities around Hoi An and thoughtfully helped me plan my 3-day itinerary. His guidance made my trip smooth and memorable.


Helen, Ivy, Min, and Emma truly went above and beyond—always warm, attentive, and extremely prompt in assisting with anything I needed. Their hospitality made me feel genuinely cared for throughout my stay.


I also really appreciated the early breakfast arrangements whenever I had to leave early for my trips—such a thoughtful and guest-focused service.


Overall, I am super happy with my stay and would definitely recommend this hotel to my family and friends.

Highly recommended 👌—I would love to stay here again!

reviews.title: The best hotel experience in Hoi An is at Hoianese!
reviews.positives: I travel full time and this has been my favorite hotel in all my travels. I stayed at Hoianese Old Town Boutique hotel for a month and was treated like family. The staff is so kind and friendly. Between the front desk staff and the housekeeping staff, they made me feel loved and appreciated as a guest. My room was outstanding - large, comfortable, clean, and included everything I needed for a long stay. The hotel amenities (free cold water, free bikes to borrow, free coffee, laundry service, etc.) were appreciated. The housekeeping staff keeps everything so clean and fresh, it's quite impressive. They are so kind, too! The hotel is peaceful and quiet, while offering some great activities (I loved the walking tour with Bao!). Although the hotel was luxurious with many amenities, it felt like an intimate homestay where you get to know everyone. I was sad to leave the hotel and staff, and I look forward to coming back to stay soon. I would not stay anywhere else in the Ancient Town area - this hotel is truly a sparkling gem. In addition to being treated so well by the entire housekeeping staff, a few members of the front desk staff genuinely made my stay amazing. Thank you to Helen, Min, Judy, and the rest of the lovely team!
reviews.negatives: Although I believe these to be honest mistakes that could have been made anywhere, staff members did accidentally enter my room without knocking a couple of times. One time this happened in the middle of the night with a male staff member, but Helen (front desk staff) was so kind to take care of me and make sure I was okay. As a solo female traveler, it was a bit of a scary experience for me but I really felt good about how things were handled, and I felt fully supported and cared for. I would not let these incidents stop me from staying here again. Everyone truly cared about my comfort, happiness, and well-being.

reviews.title: A place that needs no more words!
reviews.text: This place is where truly special staff work. The rooms and bathrooms are great, the bedding is comfortable, and the breakfast is just right, making it a very comfortable and enjoyable place during my stay. I plan to stay here again next time I visit Hoi An. Highly recommended! All the staff are very friendly, cheerful, and polite, and the hospitality and warmth from the four people at the reception were the best! Thank you to Helen, Min, Emma, and Ivy~

reviews.title: An exceptional experience that I’d happily repeat
reviews.positives: The room was absolutely comfortable and cozy. Every detail was thoughtfully arranged, making the space feel warm and inviting. They even helped us organize our next visit. I truly loved my stay and would definitely return.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing i didn’t like. Everything was great

reviews.title: Unique hotel in Hoian
reviews.text:
Great location for visiting all the sites you want- Japanese bridge, river, lantern street and old houses
 But the real gem is the staff reception with Ivy, Nim, Helen and Emma.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Best hotel in Hoian!
We stayed for a week and had the best time. The hotel is very clean and they clean the room everyday, the bed is so comfortable and the a/c work great.
The hotel is walking distance from everything in the city. 
The staff is so friendly and helpful, especially Min, Helen and Judy! They welcomed us with big smiles, gave us so many recommendations for Hoian and helped us with everything we needed.
I couldn't recommend this hotel enough!
reviews.negatives: There was a problem in the shower that the water temperature was unstable.

reviews.title: Awesome staff
reviews.text: Amazing stay. i forgot a computer accessory in their hotel room. They even helped me to get the product to my new location bu courier. Best hotel

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.positives: Staff were very friendly and gave us recommendations for local restaurants, tailors and tours. The free history talk organized by the hotel was amazing - would highly recommend!

reviews.title: Excellent hotel with the friendliest staff
reviews.text:
The hotel is beautiful, clean, and in the perfect location to explore Hoian. My room was large, had a very comfortable bed with high-end linens, and a bathtub! 
The staff was very helpful and always greeted you with a smile. The hotel offers a free history talk at it's sister hotel. Bao was passionate and informative. Also, I did the food tour with Cindy. She's a delight and the food was authentic and delicious. Highly recommend both

reviews.title: Wonderful place to stay
reviews.positives: Free drinking water in the lobby, breakfast was a great portion, staff were super helpful (thank you Helen, Judy and Min!), the free walking tour was a plus, good location. We were also given a pamphlet with recommendations for food and tailors and activities which made our time in Hoi a very enjoyable.

reviews.title: A clean hotel with good service.
reviews.text: Clean and good service at a reasonable price. There are friendly and passionate staff, especially Min Ivy Nguyen, who provided very kind assistance, which was impressive. I recommend adding breakfast when making a reservation. With the breakfast added, you can eat to your heart's content.

reviews.title: Great place, near old town, with a luxurious touch for a good price
reviews.positives: I loved everything! The design of the room was great, spacious, good light, comfortable bed and the bathtub amazing!!! Very clean. Good location walking distance from the old town. You can also rent a bike. The best definitely the ladies from reception, big thanks to Helen, Judy and Min for making my holiday in Hoi An an unforgettable experience! The tours they recommended were great, they explained and arranged everything. I also hired the laundry service.

reviews.title: Super Friendly Staff
reviews.text: Min, Helen, and Ivy were super friendly and helpful. They made me feel welcome from the moment I walked in. I will definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Super comfortable bed and amazing sleep if you want to relax. Only thing I would suggest is the shower in the bathroom might be suitable for elderly people or people with disabilities as you have climb into the tub.

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.text:
We only stayed one night at Hoianese Old Town, but it immediately impressed us — the room was spacious, comfortable, and far better than we expected. The staff were absolutely wonderful, always smiling and ready with helpful recommendations on what to see and do in the area.

Unfortunately, we woke up the next morning to find the hotel flooded. Even in the flooded reception area, the staff went above and beyond — they prepared breakfast for us despite the chaos! Later, we had to evacuate on a boat, and throughout the entire experience, the staff remained cheerful and supportive, which was truly remarkable.

reviews.title: Best staff
reviews.positives: The best thing at this hotel for me was the staff. Very friendly, polite and invested in making your stay the best possible experience you can get. Min, Julie and Suny were great. Catered to all my needs before I could even express them. Location was great too, close to different shops and restaurants and the room was clean with everything in it working properly. Will surely return as soon as I have the opportunity.

reviews.title: I recommend it.
reviews.text: This accommodation was booked because of the good reviews here, and the staff were really friendly and the place was to my liking. Although I couldn't stay properly due to the flood, which was very disappointing (they refunded me even though I didn't ask for it), I will definitely visit again with my whole family next time. This time, I traveled for a month in Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, and Hoi An, and among many hotels, this is the one that showed the most friendliness. The room is excellent for the price.

reviews.title: Value
reviews.positives: Value for money
reviews.negatives: They should know more about the experiences they’ve selling.

reviews.title: Perfect Hoi An Stay
reviews.text: Great place with incredibly friendly staff. You should check out the flood!

reviews.title: Great stay in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Everything here is good especially the staffs. They are the best about the property. Hieu, Tina, and Julie are so kind and we love their hospitality.

reviews.title: Absolutely amazing
reviews.text: This was one of my favourite hotels in my hotel 6 months ago trip around Asia. The staff were the most lovely and helpful people ever and the room was very spacious and comfortable. The breakfast was also amazing.

reviews.title: Comfortably kind!
reviews.positives:
The place is amazing it combines the old with the new in a very good taste. The stuff was kind and helped me even before getting there, they even facilitate me with a car from Da Nang. They helped me with tours and maps of where to go and what to do in my short time. They were definitely the best part of my staying there.
Julie, Henri and specially Min 
Thank you so much! ❤️

reviews.title: Just perfect stay for Hoi An
reviews.text: We loved our stay. Clean organized friendly staff (they explained everything) amazing design, excellent price great breakfast. Would definitely recommend as the preferred option for Hoi An

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything! The staff were amazing, the food was fantastic, the location was spectacular, etc. I would definitely recommend staying here.

reviews.title: Charming Boutique Hotel In The Heart of Old Town Hoi An
reviews.text: This quaint boutique hotel is located in a quiet neighborhood within walking distance to the Old Town shopping district. The staff go above and beyond to ensure guests are comfortable and enjoy their stay. A variety of tour options are available. The breakfast is excellent. Highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
We had a great stay at Hoianese Ancient Hostel! The staff were super helpful, especially Min—she answered all our questions, helped us book tours, and gave really good local recommendations. Our first room had some issues with the air conditioning not cooling enough, but they moved us to a different room right away, which we really appreciated.

There was a power outage from 4am to 8am during our stay, but it wasn’t too bad—there was still light and we could charge our phones. The aircon wasn’t working during that time, but the hostel gave us a small refund for the inconvenience, which was really thoughtful.

The rooms are clean, very spacious, and comfortable. Would definitely recommend staying here if you’re visiting Hoi An!

reviews.title: Exceptional Stay – Highly Recommended
reviews.text: We had a wonderful stay! The hotel is beautiful and conveniently located near the Old Town. Our room was upgraded to a villa with a lovely balcony view, and the service was truly exceptional. They also offer a complete program of activities to choose from, they are really helping the guests to maximize their Hoi An experience. The free walking tour is highly recommended which made our stay even more memorable.

reviews.title: Will comeback again!
reviews.positives: Compare to the price, I can say that the room, location, and the service is absolutely amazing. The room is very comfortale, the design is good as well, with Hoi An vibe. Location is super near the Ancient town, just need to walk a little bit. The best is the service, the receptionist is a star - Min. She is very gentle and helpful.

reviews.title: Best stay
reviews.text: Im stay in here is really the best choices, easy to go everywhere, my family love it soo much, more over the staff a really friendly and helpfull, they know everything, definitely will coming stay here again.

reviews.title: Thank you Sunny for your attentions!
reviews.positives: Staff was so friendly and welcoming, service was great. They offer great tours. Room super clean and comfortable

reviews.title: Finest Hotel on my 3 month trip
reviews.text: I like the hotel a lot and would like to stay much longer

reviews.title: Perfect hospitality
reviews.positives: Loved our stay here. Our first day we watched Sunny and Julie wave goodbye to guests after hugs and I thought “hmmm, I can’t imagine have such strong feelings about hotel staff” but boy was I wrong. From the jump Sunny, Julie, and Helen took great care of us. They presented us with a map and a lot of recommendations for our time in Hoi An. Sunny taught us to make Vietnamese coffee and they have a self service station that is always open. The architecture of the hotel is beautiful and the room wasn’t huge but perfectly spacious for our needs (we got the most basic room as well). The ac was powerful but just a note for anyone who didn’t see that the rooms do not have TVs (which we actually liked). The location was amazing as well. A five minute walk to the old town but down a beautiful, quiet lantern lined street. I had an unfortunate issue with some of my camera equipment in the old town and Sunny and the reception staff went out of their way to help me resolve it. The availability of cold drinking water was so pleasant as well as the access to coffee on demand. My partner was actually obsessed with the banana pancakes he got at breakfast and they make the best passion fruit juice I’ve ever had anywhere. The only small improvements I could offer would be a more protective glass barrier around the shower. All and all a top notch stay, great value for money, wonderful location, and unbelievable hospitality from everyone who works there. We can’t wait to return.

reviews.title: A very nice hotel in a good location
reviews.text: Front desk is great! Very helpful and full of knowledge about local things to do, foods and shops.  All the recommendations we tried were spot-on.  the hotel is new and very clean.  Old town is only about 8 mins walk on a quiet street.

reviews.title: Great hotel and staff.
reviews.positives: Great hotel and staff!    Everything you need for a great stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional Hospitality
reviews.text: I had a truly wonderful experience staying at the Hoianese hotel, where the friendly, welcoming, and helpful front desk team created an amazing vibe. A special thanks to all the exceptional staff, especially Min, Helen, and Julie, for their amazing hospitality. They patiently explained the local culture and gave me many thoughtful recommendations, which made me feel right at home. The hotel is clean, nice, and quiet, and its perfect location is within walking distance of the old quarter. I enjoyed my time here and will definitely come back!

reviews.title: Lovely two nights in charming Hanoi
reviews.positives: The location was amazing and the receptionists were so helpful and informative, especially Helen. The rooms are super clean, spacious and the free coffee and water were a lovely touch :) they were also incredibly generous to let us shower after we checked out! We definitely will stay here again in Hoi An.

reviews.title: Perfect stay in Hoi An
reviews.text:
This is one of the best ever hotels I have ever stayed in.
Good rooms, close to Market and exceptional staff.
Staff is so helpful, polite and cheerful that you will feel at home.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Thank you for the exceptional welcoming
reviews.text:

All the great advices, their kindness end our jokes with coffee in the morning. 
I love staying in this place!

reviews.title: Totally recommend 👍
reviews.positives:
The staff and the property were amazing, everything was clean, the lady from the staff gave us an explanation about the tours and what we could do on Hoi an, really helpful! 
We enjoyed the room, was spacious and we had bathtub. The breakfast was really nice, they give you a list where you can choose 2 different alternatives plus fruit and something to drink. 
Thanks for everything 💕

reviews.title: There is nothing to criticize.
reviews.text: First of all, it was clean. There wasn’t a single bug or speck of dust, and the water was pre-filled in glass bottles and kept in the fridge, which was great for having easy access to drinks. I originally upgraded from my previous room, and it had good light and a natural view that was relaxing. The bathtub was also well-maintained with no stains, making it perfect for enjoying a half-body soak. And the staff... they were really friendly. It's hard to believe... it wasn't just one person being kind. Everyone greeted me with a smile when our eyes met and checked if there was anything uncomfortable. I definitely want to stay at this hotel again when I visit Hoi An.

reviews.title: This hotel was the best we had in Vietnam. And we passed by 7 hotels during this trip.
reviews.positives:
Room: comfy mattress, great decoration, big room. Clean bath. 

Staff: Helen, from the front desk, was a brilliant concierge. Took care of our laundry, set our tours easily, always giving precise directions during our days in Hoi An. She asked a Taxi from and to Danang airport, and was the same price as Grab and big/new car. She did a free Vietnamese coffee workshop for us on our arrival. 

Location was best combination ever: very close to old town, but in a silence street. 

Breakfast: tasty

reviews.title: Exceptional Stay
reviews.text: I have no hesitation in giving this place a positive review! Hoianese manages group of hotels/hostel who really know how to provide a great experience for their guests. I already made a detailed post on Google already so I don’t want to be repetitive. Room is exactly as pictured  and was provided an upgrade without even asking. Staff are very attentive and friendly, making it a truly memorable stay. I booked three nights and extended for one more night because of how great everything was!

For the price you pay per night, this place is a miracle. Apparently they opened up 7 months ago, and I can see this place getting popular soon. You can't go wrong here!
